授業方法: All lectures are Face to Face. Due to the confidentiality of the content, most of the guest speech will NOT be recorded. Group discussion will NOT be recordedGroup work will be required in and outside the classroom.Use of Digital devices in the classroom is limited to "Course Material View", "Note Taking" and some which the lecture permit.

トピック.授業計画1:
Lecture 1-2
An introduction of the course, The overview of Global Marketing (Homework)
Lecture 3-4
Homework Presentation/Feedback, Global Standard/Gate (Homework)
Lecture 5-6
Homework Presentation/Feedback, Global Research (Homework)
Lecture 7-8
Presentation of Final Report
Global research, Product, Creative Strategy etc. 
Lecture 9-10
Guest Speech, Group Discussion (Homework)
Lecture 11-12
Guest Speech, Group Discussion (Homework)
Lecture 13-14
Final test, Discussion, Guest Speech (Homework)
トピック.授業外学習2:
Homework (total 44 hours expected )
Post lecture review. 
Group work
Test Preparation

参考書/Reference books1: Robin Lowe, Isobel Doole, Alexandra Kenyon
International Marketing Strategy: Analysis, Development and Implementation
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。

備考　Note
The theme for the report will be shared at the lecture
Test will be conducted in the classroom. You must take the test in the classroom, otherwise, your score will be "0".
"Class Contribution" score by the lecture will be deducted "5" points per each, according to your level of participation in the class, attitudes towards the class, e.g.
If you are more than 30 min late, without pre-notice, without reasons.
If you are working on non-class related matter,
If you do not show your face at online lecture.
If you miss the due for homework etc.
